raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX i filed a dispute about a scam where I bought a item for XXXX that was never shipped out. Even though I have given them proof that the item was not shipped and the the seller deleted the website after I made the purchase they say I am responsible. They will also not give me the merchant response they have recived. I have tried to get this resolved with them for 3 months and they are completely unhelpful.
